---
title: "Registration"
toc: false
---

Registration will open **September 2026**, approximately one year before the Summit. This page will then list the registration link, the full package descriptions, and the General Terms and Conditions.

The 2nd Peritoneal Summit is kept deliberately intimate — **around 90 participants** — to encourage genuine exchange across disciplines.

## Key dates

| Date | Milestone |
|---|---|
| **September 2026** | Registration opens |
| **15 June 2027** | Abstract submission deadline · early-bird registration closes |
| **Early July 2027** | Abstract decisions communicated |
| **Mid-August 2027** | Accommodation booking deadline — limited rooms at the venue, book early |
| **Until the conference** | Regular registration remains open, subject to capacity |

## Provisional packages

::: {.pricing-grid}

::: {.price-card}
### Student Conference Package
<div class="tiers">
<div class="tier"><span class="tier-label">Early bird</span><span class="tier-price">Coming soon</span></div>
<div class="tier"><span class="tier-label">Regular</span><span class="tier-price">Coming soon</span></div>
</div>
Three days · reduced rate for undergraduate and graduate students
- Three-day conference pass
- Meals according to program
- Gala dinner included
- All networking events
- Free access to all workshops
:::

::: {.price-card}
### Basic Conference Package
<div class="tiers">
<div class="tier"><span class="tier-label">Early bird</span><span class="tier-price">Coming soon</span></div>
<div class="tier"><span class="tier-label">Regular</span><span class="tier-price">Coming soon</span></div>
</div>
Three days · standard rate
- Three-day conference pass
- Meals according to program
- Gala dinner included
- All networking events
- Free access to all workshops
:::

::: {.price-card}
### Accommodation
<p class="price-tbd">Pricing — coming soon</p>
Per night · at the conference venue
- Breakfast included
- Walking distance from sessions
- Limited availability — book early once registration opens
:::

:::

## Stay informed

Until registration opens, the best way to stay informed about deadlines and the program is to keep an eye on this page or contact the organizers (see [Contact](contact.qmd)).

## General Terms and Conditions

The full GTCs will be published alongside registration in September 2026.
